title: Using STORE Capital Proceeds To Buy Alexandria Real Estate

title: Alexandria Real Estate: The Stock Market Has Lost Its Mind, I'm Buying
text: Alexandria Real Estate, so far in 2022, has lost nearly 36% of its value and the stock seems to be directly in the crosshairs of sellers.
